name: Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the onion, celery, and carrots in olive oil.
2. Wash the lentils and add them to a pot with the chicken stock, ham bone, bouquet garni, more chicken stock, and bay leaf.
3. Cook until the lentils are mushy (less than one hour).
4. Remove the bay leaf and puree the mixture. If the puree is too thin, add some water.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Cut up the sausage and add it to the soup.
